rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, explaining the benefits of reordering the paragraphs to follow a logical flow from setup to prior work, contribution, and results.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags one potential issue regarding the stability decay rate depending only on (A, B, Q) and the minimum sensor cost, but does not provide uncertainty for other claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions without any drift or additional content outside the scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's reorganization is harm-free and identifies no harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent annotates changes with sources and reasons, though not every minor edit is explicitly traced.
